epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ILAE criteria with focal seizure semiology; EEG and imaging where available

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate due to treatment gap and limited EEG/MRI access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: EEG/imaging concentrated in urban centers; many diagnoses are clinical
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Affordable ASMs (carbamazepine, levetiracetam, phenytoin); referral for drug-resistant epilepsy evaluation where available
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Neurologist scarcity and delayed referral for surgery evaluation
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Availability of low-cost generic ASMs and growing tertiary epilepsy centers
